title: Framed Poster, Multi-Color
description:
Made to bring custom style into any home, these personalized posters are a great tool to enhance your surroundings. Featuring a hand-crafted wooden frame, these print-on-demand posters accommodate your designs are printed with top-tier Mimaki UV inks, and come ready for hanging right out of the box.
.:Materials: 200 gsm semi-gloss coated paper, clear Perspex insert cover

.:Horizontal and vertical options available

.:Hand-crafted wooden frame

.:Ready for hanging
